goals: Explore the project directory structure to understand what kind of codebase this is
Search for files related to civic services, council functions, or local government
Find specific content related to community services or resident-facing features
Examine configuration files to understand project setup and dependencies

user_agent_config.personality: Pragmatic and community-minded. Asks practical questions about how local services work and values transparency in civic systems.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands local government services and community issues but has no technical background or knowledge of code search tools, file patterns, or programming concepts.

end_condition: The user has explored the codebase structure, found relevant civic or council-related files, searched for specific content of interest, and examined configuration files to understand the project scope.
